story: After he and his brothers rob a Santa Fe bank and bury the gold by a black, rotted tree, Randall decides the two drunks are a danger and cuts their throats before dawn. He digs up the stash, loads it on three horses, rides to town, and launders the haul through two brokers and a crooked assayer for drafts and cash. Randall sells the horses and plans to take the 3:10 to Yuma.When the deal is done, the assayer strolls into the telegraph office and wires a fixer to have the 3:10 to Yuma watched.
implausible_knowledge: When the deal is done, the assayer strolls into the telegraph office and wires a fixer to have the 3:10 to Yuma watched.
question: What will Randall do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Avoid the 3:10, slipping out of town by another route.
answer_without_knowledge: Board the 3:10 to Yuma as planned.
